event: transurethral resection of the prostate in 2009
treatment with low molecular weight heparin
asymmetrical hyperdensity of right masticator space venous structures
acute thrombosis of right pterygoid venous plexus
multidisciplinary team decision to treat with LMWH
complete resolution of right SOV thrombosis
marked improvement in lung parenchymal appearances
no residual abnormalities from SOV thrombosis
